cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out what present Eve ends up with after all the swaps. Let me start by listing out the initial presents each person has. Initially: - Alice has yellow - Bob has orange - Claire has red - Dave has purple - Eve has green Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go through each step one by one. First swap: Alice and Eve swap. So Alice gives her yellow to Eve, and Eve gives her green to Alice. After this swap: - Alice has green - Eve has yellow The others remain the same: Bob (orange), Claire (red), Dave (purple) Second
